content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Sum of Round Numbers". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1352/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains a single integer n.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the sum of round numbers from 1 to n.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Iterate through all numbers from 1 to n, check if the number is round (i.e., it has a '0' at the end or it is a power of 10), and add it to the sum.
